questions.questionText:
Which version of android?

- Initial release, laid the foundation for the mobile OS.
- Include basic features like email, web browsing, and contact management.

Which version of android?

- Introduce on-screen keyboard, widgets, and support for uploading videos to YouTube.

Which version of android?

- Improved camera and text-to-speech.
- Enhanced support for different screen sizes.

Which version of android?

- Introduced support for multiple accounts (Gmail, Exchange), improved camera features (autofocus, scene modes), and faster performance.

Which version of android?

- Significant performance boost with faster startup times and smoother operation.
- Introduced Wi-Fi hotspot functionality.

Which version of android?

- Improved support for gaming, better copy-paste functionality, and enhanced support for voice calling.

Which version of android?

- Designed specifically for tablets.
- Featuring a redesigned user interface optimized for larger screens.

Which version of android?

- Unified the smartphone and tablet experiences, introducing a refined user interface and improved camera features.

Which version of android?

- Introduced Project Butter, significantly improving performance and smoothness.
- Added Google Now, a personalized assistant.

Which version of android?

- Optimized for lower-end devices, requiring less RAM.
- Introduced wireless printing capabilities.

Which version of android?

- Material Design introduced, significantly revamping the visual appearance of the OS.
- Improved batter life with Project Volta.

Which version of android?

- Introduced Doze mode for improved battery life in idle states.
- Enhanced app permissions with runtime requests.

Which version of android?

- Introduced multi-window support, allowing users to run two apps side-by-side.
- Enhanced notifications with improved grouping and reply options.

Which version of android?

- Introduced Picture-in-Picture mode.
- Enhanced notification channels for better control app notifications.

Which version of android?

- Introduced gesture navigation.
- Enhanced AI-powered features like app actions and suggestions.

Which version of android?

- Dark Mode introduced system-wide.
- Improved privacy and security features.

Which version of android?

- Introduced conversation bubbles for improved messaging experiences.
- Enhanced media controls and improved privacy features.

Which version of android?

- Major redesign with a focus on Material You, a dynamic theming system.
- Improved privacy features with approximate location sharing.

Which version of android?

- Enhanced customization options, including per-app language settings.
- Improved media playback controls.

Which version of android?

- Focus on privacy and security enhancements.
- Improved compatibility with larger screens.

Which version of android?

- Private Space: This feature allows you to create a separate, secure space on your phone to store sensitive apps and data, providing an extra layer of privacy and security.

Which version of android?

- Larger screen & foldable improvements.
- Bundled/organized notifications.
- Enhanced security & advanced permission behavior.
- UI refinements with Material design evolution.

name: PELEC203 Midterm Topic 2 - Introduction to Mobile Development

questions.questionText: Who are the 4 founders behind android development?
questions.answer: Andy Rubin, Rich Miner, Nick Sears, Chris White

questions.questionText: Who is known as the founder of android?
Who is the co-founder of android who is a telecommunication expert?
Who is the co-founder of android who is a former president of T-Mobile?
Who is the co-founder of android development that is the head of UI designing?
Advantage of React Native (5 Items)
questions.answer: Cross-Platform Development, Fast Development, Large Community and Ecosystem, Native Performance, Cost-Effectiveness

questions.questionText: Disadvantages of React Native (3 Items)
questions.answer: Evolving Framework, Breaking Changes, Stability Issues
